description: Dependency DAG among 15 sorry sites + shared infrastructure. Edge A -> B means proving A is required for B. Session 4 integration (v4.1).
updated: 2026-03-19 (v4.1: 67 -> 15 sorrys, cross-direction analysis, infrastructure nodes added)

fin_arithmetic_toolkit.name: fin_arithmetic_toolkit

fin_arithmetic_toolkit.status: PARTIALLY BUILT — sorry-free definitions in working copy (uncommitted), iIndepFun_block_extract has sorry

symmetrization_infrastructure.name: symmetrization_infrastructure
symmetrization_infrastructure.description: D^(2m) ghost sample coupling + conditioned restriction counting. Double-sample technique for concentration bounds.
symmetrization_infrastructure.status: NOT BUILT — route confirmed by D1v5 and D1v6 agents

vcdim_finite_imp_uc.note: Not critical path — factorial bypass proves PAC

vcdim_finite_imp_compression.reason: Moran-Yehudayoff 2016 (Gamma_76). Littlestone-Warmuth conjecture OPEN 40yr ($600 bounty). Gamma_82: Chase 2022 claimed/withdrew, Chase et al. COLT 2024 showed exponential barriers.

vcdim_bounds_rademacher_quantitative.method: Massart finite lemma via tensorized Hoeffding + Sauer-Shelah

rademacher_vanishing_imp_pac.method: Contrapositive: VCDim=inf -> exists D where Rad doesn't vanish

sample_complexity_upper_bound.session4_progress: All measure theory scaffolded. Remaining sorry is pure arithmetic: show ceil((8/eps)(d*log(2/eps)+log(2/delta))) suffices.
sample_complexity_upper_bound.gamma_80: NOT one-line — needs log splitting chain

compression_bounds_vcdim.status: OPEN — proof strategy identified but NOT closed
compression_bounds_vcdim.session4_progress: Statement corrected from FALSE 2^k-1 (Gamma_79) to 2^(cs.size)-1. Proof strategy via pigeonhole + exp_beats_poly_at identified (Gamma_81). shatters_mono and exp_beats_poly_at made public. SESSION_END_NOTES erroneously claimed closure.

boost_two_thirds_to_pac.session4_progress: Learner construction written. Event containment proved. Probability chain set up. Remaining: Chebyshev composition with block independence via iIndepFun_block_extract.
boost_two_thirds_to_pac.side_effect: Closing this also closes universal_imp_pac (Separation calls boost directly)

universal_strictly_stronger_pac.reason: Gamma_68: Bousquet et al. STOC 2021 proved PAC <-> Universal for binary classification

natarajan_not_characterizes_pac.reason: Requires hyperbolic pseudo-manifolds (Januszkiewicz-Swiatkowski 2003). Deep algebraic topology absent from Mathlib.

computational_hardness_pac.reason: Requires one-way function infrastructure. Outside type system scope.

block_extract.description: Extract block j from Fin(k*m) sample via finProdFinEquiv

majority_vote.description: Majority vote over k Boolean votes

block_extract_disjoint.description: Index sets for different blocks are disjoint

iIndepFun_block_extract.description: Block extractions are independent under Measure.pi
proof_routes: Route B: direct product formula via cylinder sets

cross_direction_discovery.implication: Building shared infrastructure is highest-leverage action. Individual sorry attacks without this infrastructure are wasteful.
